# Perla Lutchman

> Miami-based brand strategist and luxury real estate advisor. Two focused offerings under one name: brand strategy & consulting, and luxury residential + pre-construction real estate in Miami.

## About
Perla Lutchman brings 12+ years of entrepreneurial and business experience and an MBA to every client relationship. Originally from Venezuela and raised in Trinidad & Tobago, she works from Miami.

## Sites
- [Brand Strategy](branding.html): Brand development, positioning, business strategy, and customer experience for entrepreneurs, professionals, and growing businesses. Journey stages: Vision, Launch, Momentum, Growth, Legacy.
- [Luxury Real Estate](real-estate.html): Luxury residential and pre-construction real estate across Brickell, Edgewater, Downtown Miami, Doral, and Biscayne Park. Affiliated with Avanti Way Realty LLC.

## Contact
- Phone/WhatsApp: (786) 724-5779
